arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola fits the bill as Brazil legend refuses to deny job talks and issues demand
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has been managing Manchester City since 2016, but their recent run of form has seen his name touted with one particular national team

arts.ttl: Man City eye Premier League star as long-term Kyle Walker replacement
arts.sum: Manchester City are looking to continue their ongoing rebuild by sourcing a replacement for Kyle Walker, who is likely to have played his last game for the club.

arts.ttl: Tottenham takeover update as Daniel Levy two 'demands' emerge amid sale claim
arts.sum: Daniel Levy is said to be pricing Tottenham Hotspur out of a potential takeover because of his high valuation and intention to remain involved in the club. The publication also alleges Levy is one of the reasons behind the lack of a buyer for Tottenham, per people familiar with the talks on a potential sale.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Man City live early team news plus kick-off time and how to watch
arts.sum: Manchester City are in North London to take on Tottenham in the Premier League, where a win will strengthen their top four chances.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola coy on Kevin De Bruyne's Man City future
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne's contract at Manchester City is up in the summer and his minutes are no longer guaranteed under Pep Guardiola.

arts.ttl: Hugo Lloris defends under-fire Tottenham chairman Daniel Levy: 'He has my support'
arts.sum: The former Spurs captain has previously questioned Daniel Levy’s actions

arts.ttl: Manchester City star insists overhaul shouldn’t be on cards, despite need to ‘renew itself’ this summer
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Bernardo Silva has urged the club not to tear up everything and start again as it could be the ‘beginning of the end’. Sport cover comments from the midfielder made today in an interview with DAZN in which he assesses Manchester City’s season and what they’re doing to rectify matters. This season The post Manchester City star insists overhaul shouldn’t be on cards, despite need to ‘renew itself’ this summer appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Atletico Madrid 'in the hunt' for former La Liga midfielder
arts.sum: Manchester City may reportedly receive interest in one of their midfielders from Atletico Madrid during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Chris Wood looking to build on 'unusual stat' after outperforming Erling Haaland and Mo Salah
arts.sum: Only three players have scored more goals than Chris Wood in the Premier League this season, with the Nottingham Forest star aiming to fire his team into the Champions League

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Man City team news hints as five Ange Postecoglou clues emerge hours ahead of match
arts.sum: That trio have started the last two matches, with Danso and Tel featuring in all four games since signing for Spurs. Tottenham Hotspur have hinted James Maddison could return to the starting line-up against Manchester City after excelling in the reverse fixture.
